title: List of External Advisory Bodies for the Public Health Agency of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## List of External Advisory Bodies for the Public Health Agency of Canada
- External Advisory Committee on Science (ACS)
- Advisory Committee on Human Pathogens and Toxins (HPT-AC)
- Advisory Group on Antimicrobial Resistance
- Canadian Perinatal Surveillance System External Advisory Committee (CPSSEAC)
- Committee to Advise on Tropical Medicine and Travel (CATMAT)
- Expert Advisory Body on the Economic Cost of Illness in Canada
- External Expert Review of the Canadian Task Force on Preventive Health Care
- Implementation Advisory Panel for the Renewal of the Canadian Task Force on Preventive Health Care
- Ministerial Advisory Board on Dementia
- National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
- National Advisory Committee on Infection Prevention and Control (NAC-IPC)
- National Advisory Committee on Preventive Health Services (NACPHS)
- National Advisory Committee on Sexually Transmitted and Blood-borne Infections (NAC-STBBI)
- Public Health Ethics Consultative Group (PHECG)
- PHAC External Advisory Body Policy
